chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1127 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.07.2025 Mr. Anil Kumar advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w IO Inspector Ghulam Qadir Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant P.G Sindh *** Pursuant to notice Investigation Officer of Crime No.92 of 2025 registered at P.S Talhar District Badin under Section 365-B, 457 and 34 PPC has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically stated that she being sui-juris has contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 and no one has abducted her and the subject FIR is false and concocted one. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of petitioner No.1 he will file his report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case in terms of the statement of petitioner No.1. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly, however, prayed that directions may be issued to police authorities to provide legal protections to the petitioners. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to submit his final report within seven days from today before the learned Magistrate concerned, who shall pass speaking order in view of the statement of petitioner No.1. Meanwhile petitioners be provided due protection in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Sajjad Ali Jessar
